holdings.infoBox: PRVS is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 7.42%, Alphabet at 6.35%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.52%, Applied Materials at 5.16%, and AstraZeneca at 4.75%.

overview.description: The Parnassus Value Select ETF (PRVS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in a concentrated portfolio of 20-30 large-cap US equity securities using a value strategy. The fund focuses on undervalued companies with strong financials and sustainable business practices, aiming for capital appreciation while minimizing exposure to broader market risks  PRVS was launched on Dec 12, 2024 and is issued by Parnassus Investments.

data.title: Parnassus Investments Debuts Active ETFs
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Parnassus Investments, a pioneer in sustainable investing, today announced the launch of its first two exchange-traded funds (ETFs), the Parnassus Core Select ETF (NYSE...
